name: RocTool S.A.
summary: RocTool S.A. provides induction heating systems, tooling hardware products, power units, and peripherals. It offers tooling components; generators, interfaces, and cooling units; and installation, design, and engineering services. The company serves automotive, consumer electronics, consumer goods, aerospace, medical, and beauty packaging industries. RocTool S.A. is headquartered in Le Bourget du Lac, France.
